summary: Student in Finance at HEC Paris with a strong focus on M&A and Private Equity. Proven analytical skills through internships at Tier-1 banks and active involvement in university investment clubs. Seeking a Summer Analyst position to leverage financial modeling and valuation expertise.

education.degree: Master in Management, Specialization in Finance
bullets: Relevant Coursework: Corporate Finance, Financial Accounting, M&A, LBO Modeling

experience.title: Summer Analyst, Investment Banking Division
bullets: Analyzed financial statements and built DCF, LBO, and trading comparables models to value potential targets.

sub_bullets: Project Alpha: Advised a €500M tech company on its sale to a private equity firm; created management presentations.
Project Beta: Conducted due diligence and market research for a cross-border M&A deal in the healthcare sector.

experience.title: Vice President
bullets: Organized 10+ networking events and technical workshops for over 200 club members.
Managed a virtual portfolio of €50,000, achieving a 12% return over 6 months.

skills.Technical Skills: Excel (Financial Modeling, VBA), PowerPoint, Bloomberg Terminal, Python
skills.Interests: Marathon running, Chess, Geopolitics, Backpacking across Southeast Asia
